ClusterIdentifier.description: The cluster identifier for a provisioned cluster

DbUser.description: The database user name for temporary credentials

SecretArn.description: ARN of the secret in AWS Secrets Manager

Sqls.description: One or more SQL statements to run. The statements run serially as a single transaction. Maximum 40 statements.

StatementName.description: A name for the batch SQL statement

WithEvent.description: Whether to send an event to EventBridge on completion
